description_long: This is a modern high-rise office building characterized by a sleek glass curtain wall facade with a grid of white structural framing. The building features large, blue-tinted windows arranged in a regular, geometric pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The lower level includes a commercial frontage with transparent glass panels, likely for retail or lobby spaces, and a recessed main entrance. Horizontal architectural fins and black accent bands add visual interest and break up the verticality of the structure. The roof is flat and appears to be finished with a light-colored material, possibly concrete or membrane. The overall design is clean, rectilinear, and typical of contemporary urban office towers.
description: A modern, blue-glass office building with a white grid facade, commercial ground floor, and flat roof. Features include large windows, horizontal fins, and a prominent street-level entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, commercial ground floor, and the prominent white grid framing the blue glass windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass facade, horizontal fins, and the full width of the building's grid pattern.
description_view_2: Rear or secondary side view with a mostly uninterrupted blue glass surface and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grid pattern, black accent band, and a less prominent ground floor.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular grid of large, rectangular windows arranged in horizontal and vertical bands, separated by white mullions.
attribute_building_entrance_type: recessed entry with double glass doors
